task_completion.visual_evidence: In the NextGen Connect Administrator GUI, the Channels list should display a channel exactly named 'Fail_Safe_Archiver'.

task_completion.description: Verify the source is configured to listen on TCP port 6661.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Source tab of the channel, the connector type should be 'TCP Listener' and the Local Port should be set to '6661'.

task_completion.description: Verify the destination is configured to send to localhost:9999.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Destinations tab of the channel, the connector type should be 'TCP Sender' with the Host set to 'localhost' (or '127.0.0.1') and the Port set to '9999'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Fail Fast' queue and retry settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Destinations tab or Channel settings, 'Queue Messages' should be set to 'Never' (or disabled) and the retry count/limit should be set to '0'.

task_completion.description: Verify the JavaScript Post-Processor script is configured to archive failed messages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Scripts -> Postprocessor tab, there should be JavaScript code that checks for an ERROR or FAILURE status and includes logic to write a file to '/tmp/failed_messages/' with a '.hl7' extension.

task_completion.description: Verify the sample message was processed and archived successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing the contents of '/tmp/failed_messages/' containing a '.hl7' file, OR the NextGen Connect Dashboard showing the 'Fail_Safe_Archiver' channel with at least 1 message in the 'Error' or 'Received' statistics columns.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NextGen Connect Administrator GUI to configure the channel.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the NextGen Connect Administrator Java application interface being interacted with, rather than just editing XML configuration files in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the message was actually sent through the channel.
integrity.visual_evidence: The NextGen Connect dashboard should show message statistics (Received/Error counts > 0) for the channel, indicating real processing occurred.

integrity.description: Verify the archived file was not manually created by the agent.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal history should not show commands like 'cp /home/ga/sample.hl7 /tmp/failed_messages/...' or 'echo ... > /tmp/failed_messages/...'. The file creation must be the result of the channel's script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The channel must be named exactly 'Fail_Safe_Archiver'. Source: TCP Listener on port 6661 (MLLP). Destination: TCP Sender to localhost:9999. Queue settings must be disabled ('Queue Messages: Never' / NO_QUEUE) with 0 retries. The post-processor script must archive failed messages to the directory '/tmp/failed_messages/'. The sample file to be processed is located at '/home/ga/sample.hl7'.
